seoTitle: Mount Lewis vs Mount Lindsey — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Lewis and Mount Lindsey. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Lewis vs Mount Lindsey: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Lewis and Mount Lindsey.
heading: Mount Lewis vs Mount Lindsey — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Lewis, New South Wales and Mount Lindsey, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Lindsey has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Mount Lewis (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Lewis or Mount Lindsey safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Lewis has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Mount Lindsey scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Lewis scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Lindsey scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Lewis or Mount Lindsey?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Lindsey has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.93% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
